<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/user_management/users/{user_id}/connected_accounts/{slug}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieves a user's [connected account](/reference/pipes/connected-account) for a specific provider.
